zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Coker於大約1412年出生在英國薩默塞特萊迪亞爾德 聖 勞倫斯時，她的父親Robert Coker34歲，母親Joan Wallys29歲。她於1449年與John Seymour在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。她去世於1472年4月19日在英國享年61歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭倫敦貝丁頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Coker于大约1412年出生在英国薩默塞特萊迪亞爾德 聖 勞倫斯时，她的父亲Robert Coker34岁，母亲Joan Wallys29岁。她于1449年与John Seymour在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。她去世于1472年4月19日在英国享年61岁，埋葬在英国英格兰倫敦貝丁頓。

nameMeanings.name: Coker
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from a group of villages in Somerset named with Coker, from a Celtic river name meaning ‘crooked’.

variants.name: Cocker
meanings: English (Yorkshire and Lancashire): nickname for a quarrelsome person, from Middle English coker ‘fighter, wrangler’.
English: occupational name, ‘one who puts up hay in cocks’, a seasonal occupation.
Probably an Americanized form of German   Kocher  .

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Coker was born about 1412, in Lydeard St Lawrence, Somerset, England, her father, Robert Coker, was 34 and her mother, Joan Wallys, was 29. She married John Seymour in 1449, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. She died on 19 April 1472, in England, at the age of 61, and was buried in Beddington, London, England, United Kingdom.

fr.South Savernake with Brimslade and Cadle: South Savernake with Brimslade and Cadley, Wiltshire, Angleterre
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Coker est née environ 1412, à Lydeard St Lawrence, Somerset, Angleterre, son père, Robert Coker, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Joan Wallys, avait 29 ans. Elle a épousé John Seymour en 1449, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Elle est décédée le 19 avril 1472, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 61 ans, et a été enterrée à Beddington, Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Coker um 1412 in Lydeard St Lawrence, Somerset, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert Coker 34 und ihre Mutter Joan Wallys 29. Sie hat 1449 in England, United Kingdom John Seymour geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Sie starb am 19. April 1472 im Alter von 61 Jahren in England und wurde in Beddington, London, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lei sposato John Seymour nel 1449, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì il 19 aprile 1472, nel England, all'età di 61 anni, e fu sepolta a Beddington, London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Cokerが約1412年にイギリスソメルセトリディールド スト ラウレンスで生まれた時，父Robert Cokerは34歳，母Joan Wallysは29歳であった。1449年にイギリスイギリスでJohn Seymourと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼女は1472年4月19日にイギリスで61歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスロンドンベッドイントンにて埋葬された。

ko.South Savernake with Brimslade and Cadle: 영국 윌츠히르 소우스 새버나크 위스 브림슬라드 앤드 카들리
ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Coker(이)가 대략 1412년 영국 서머세트 리디르드 스트 로렌스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert Coker(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan Wallys(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 1449년 영국 잉글랜드에서 John Seymour(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1472년 4월 19일 영국에서 61세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 런던 베딩턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Coker nasceu aproximadamente 1412, em Lydeard St Lawrence, Somerset, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert Coker, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Joan Wallys, tinha 29 anos. Ela casou-se com John Seymour em 1449, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ela faleceu em 19 de abril de 1472, em Inglaterra, com 61 anos, e foi sepultada em Beddington, London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.South Savernake with Brimslade and Cadle: соут савирнеик вит бримслад анд кадли, уилцхир, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Coker родилась около 1412 г. в местности лидирд ст ларенс, сомирсет, Англия, её отцу по имени Robert Coker было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Joan Wallys, 29. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Seymour в 1449 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Она умерла 19 апреля 1472 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 61 год и была похоронена в местности беддингтон, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания.
